overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk along a futuristic city sidewalk. The player moves from a shadowed highway overpass into bright sunlit streets, passing pedestrians, digital billboards, and cyberpunk architecture with distinctive orange paving tiles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban walkway under highway overpass

events.description: exits the shadow of the overpass into bright direct sunlight
moves from under the concrete overpass into the open urban street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward from the shadowed overpass into sunlight

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating deep shadow overhead
smooth gray concrete wall running along the right side of the walkway
distinctive bright orange textured paving tiles covering the pedestrian walkway
large futuristic digital advertising screens mounted on distant buildings
tall palm trees lining the street beyond the traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in the deep shadow of a massive concrete highway overpass. The player walks forward along an orange-tiled sidewalk next to a smooth concrete wall, emerging around the 6-second mark into bright morning sunlight. Digital billboards and palm trees become visible in the distance as the scene opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial sidewalk with storefronts and street vendors

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit orange sidewalk passing various storefronts and street elements

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: multi-story buildings with ground-floor storefronts and signage
tall modern street light poles with yellow fixtures
green dumpsters and garbage containers along the building wall
small blue food vending cart with yellow umbrella

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open sunlit sidewalk with the distinctive orange paving tiles. Commercial buildings line the right side featuring storefronts and a food cart, while futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road to the left. The camera passes trash bins and street lights as it moves through this commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: approaches and crosses the pedestrian crosswalk at the intersection
navigates through crossing pedestrians while maintaining forward progress

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while navigating through other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: shirtless man in shorts crossing the street from left to right
child in yellow jacket running along the sidewalk ahead

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing with yellow and white painted lines
suspended traffic signals and crosswalk indicators over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with a prominent crosswalk. The player crosses the street among a moderate crowd of pedestrians, including a shirtless man and a running child. Traffic lights hang overhead while futuristic cars navigate the intersection. The commercial buildings draw closer on the right as the crossing completes.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with graffiti wall approaching covered commercial walkway

events.description: approaching and entering the covered walkway section with glass storefronts

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past a graffiti-covered wall toward a covered commercial area

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art tags
overhead covered walkway with curved metal supports and glass panels
modern glass-fronted commercial shops with metal frames

segments.scene_description: Walking along the orange sidewalk with a prominent graffiti-covered wall on the right. The player approaches a covered walkway structure with modern glass storefronts. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the environment transitions from open street to a more enclosed commercial arcade area with overhead covering.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the deep shadows of a concrete overpass into a vibrant, sun-drenched futuristic commercial district. It begins in the gloom beside a smooth concrete wall, moving along an orange-tiled sidewalk before emerging into bright morning sunlight where digital billboards and palm trees appear in the distance. As the camera advances through the open sunlit street, the view expands to reveal storefronts, a food cart, and futuristic vehicles gliding past on a multi-lane road. The scene then shifts into a wide urban intersection, crossing a busy street among a crowd of pedestrians and hanging traffic lights before turning back toward the sidewalk. Finally, the camera passes a graffiti-covered wall and moves under a covered walkway, transitioning from the open city air into a more enclosed commercial arcade with modern glass storefronts.
